transcript: Thank you for watching. I don't know. Out of the way. Now? Yeah. Yeah, I'll be right down. Face it, Jim. This is out of control. This is our fourth victim we've come after. At this rate, there won't be any girls left in a knife. At this rate, there won't be any girls left in the city. Yes, sir, I know it's bad, but I assure you, I am right on this bastard's heels. I'm going to catch him before he kills her, and then I'm going to put him away for good. Yes, detective, that's what you said the last time. You sent this precinct on wild goose chases that they don't have the patience for. There's only so many times I can send a SWAT team into an empty warehouse. Yes, sir, I understand. But with each of those operations, I'd be getting closer and closer. I'd be learning more and more about how he thinks. I am so close. You'd better be. Because if this is the way your first case has gone, I'd hate to see how the rest of your career is going to pan out. Track him? Have you been reading footprints in the mud, Holloway? No, sir, but I think you've messed up this time. You see, at every other crime scene, the victim's phone had been accounted for, but no one was able to account for the victim's phone. That must mean it's still on her person, and if that's the case, then I can call the number and get a ping on the device's location. Yeah, but assuming that the phone is still there, and assuming that the phone is still on, it could alert our kidnapper and send him into a panic it won't get to that sir you see if you just let me out i can be there i can stop it you just have to let me out assuming i was to go after him today i would send a group of officers and not just one detective but sir i know enough i'm benching you for this case detective and if you do so much as interfere with it in any way i'll have your badge Thank you very much. If you do so much as interfere with it in any way, I'll have your badge. Hey there, Matt. Yeah, I need a favour. I need you to trace a call. Next right, yeah? Hey! Stop right there! Help, please! I can't! Whoa, whoa. Take it easy. Just put that thing down, alright? There's nowhere to go. Just put that thing down and give it up. Now for weeks, I've been chasing you. Round and round in circles, but not this time. It's over. You know, this time I beat you. You're going away for a long time because this time I win.好 Thanks for watching! Thank you.
